name: patrick-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Patrick

plugins.name: review-ui
plugins.description: Conversation viewer and live review system for Claude Code sessions. Serves a web UI for browsing conversations, annotating messages, and posting review comments that Claude picks up automatically.

plugins.name: comment-mode
plugins.description: Adds an inspector-style annotation layer to any single-page HTML application. When activated, users can click any UI element or highlight text to leave comments.
